---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Rachel Austin"
date: "2026-03-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(psych)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(powertools)
```
Power Analysis for Aim 1:

```{r}
df <- read.csv("Project 2/Data Raw/PrelimData.csv")
```

```{r}


vars <- df[, c("IL_6", "MCP_1", "CORT_CNG3", "CVLT_CNG3")]

res <- corr.test(vars)

# Extract results
r_mat <- round(res$r, 2)
r_mat[upper.tri(r_mat)] <- ""

kable(r_mat,
      caption = "Correlation Matrix",
      booktabs = TRUE,
      align = "c") %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))
```

```{r}

# correlations
r_vals <- seq(-0.2, -0.7, by = -0.1)

# alpha levels
alphas <- c(0.05/6, 0.05/4, 0.05/24)
alpha_labels <- c("0.05/6", "0.05/4", "0.05/24")

# empty results object
results <- data.frame()

for (a in seq_along(alphas)) {
  for (r in r_vals) {
    
    test <- corr.1samp(
      N = 175,
      rho0 = 0,
      rhoA = r,
      alpha = alphas[a],
      sides = 2
    )
    
    results <- rbind(
      results,
      data.frame(
        r = r,
        alpha = alpha_labels[a],
        power = test
      )
    )
  }
}

results

```
